bmi.title: BMI Calculator
bmi.desc: Free online BMI calculator. Calculate your Body Mass Index instantly and check your weight category.
bmi.metaDesc: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) instantly. Free online BMI calculator with weight categories, healthy range, and metric/imperial units.
bmi.faq1a: BMI (Body Mass Index) is a measure of body fat based on height and weight. It is calculated by dividing weight in kilograms by the square of height in meters.
bmi.faq2q: What is a healthy BMI range?
bmi.faq2a: A healthy BMI range is 18.5 to 24.9. Below 18.5 is underweight, 25 to 29.9 is overweight, and 30 or above is obese.
bmi.faq3a: BMI is a general screening tool and may not be accurate for athletes, pregnant women, or the elderly. Consult a healthcare professional for a complete health assessment.

age.title: Age Calculator
age.desc: Free online age calculator. Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days instantly.
age.metaDesc: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days. Free online age calculator with birthday countdown, total days lived, and date of birth to age conversion.
age.faq1a: Your age is calculated by subtracting your birth date from the current date. The result shows the exact number of years, months, and days you have lived.
age.faq2q: Can I calculate age for any date?
age.faq2a: Yes, you can select any date to calculate age as of that specific date. This is useful for determining age at a future event or past milestone.
age.faq3q: How many days has a newborn lived?
age.faq3a: A newborn has lived 0 days. The counter starts from day 1 after birth. Our calculator shows total days, weeks, and months lived for any age.

currency.title: Currency Converter
currency.desc: Free online currency converter. Convert between USD, EUR, GBP, JPY and 150+ currencies with live exchange rates.

shoeGuide.title: Shoe Size Conversion Guide
shoeGuide.howToMeasureDesc1: Place your foot on a piece of paper with your heel against a wall.
shoeGuide.howToMeasureDesc2: Mark the longest toe and measure the distance from the wall to the mark.
shoeGuide.howToMeasureDesc3: Use this measurement in centimeters to find your size in the chart below.
shoeGuide.sizeChartNote: Sizes are approximate. Always try shoes on when possible.
shoeGuide.tip1: Measure your feet in the afternoon — feet swell during the day.
shoeGuide.tip2: Measure both feet and use the larger measurement.
shoeGuide.tip3: Different brands may fit differently — check their specific size guide.
shoeGuide.faq1: How do US men's and women's sizes differ?
shoeGuide.faq1a: US women's sizes run approximately 1.5 sizes larger than men's for the same foot length. For example, a US Women's 9 is roughly equivalent to a US Men's 7.5.
shoeGuide.faq2: What is the difference between US and UK shoe sizes?
shoeGuide.faq2a: US men's sizes are approximately 1 size larger than UK sizes. For example, US 9 ≈ UK 8.
shoeGuide.faq3: How do I convert EU sizes to US sizes?
shoeGuide.faq3a: EU sizes use a different scale where each size increment equals 2/3 cm (6.67 mm). EU 40 ≈ US Men's 7.5, EU 42 ≈ US Men's 9.
shoeGuide.metaTitle: Shoe Size Conversion Guide - International Shoe Size Chart
shoeGuide.metaDesc: Comprehensive shoe size conversion guide. Convert between US, UK, EU, Japanese sizes and centimeters. Find your perfect fit with our international shoe size chart.
